mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emp (username, password, name, gender, phone, salary, image, entry_date, dept_id, create_time, update_time
,job ) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{salary}, #{image}, #{entryDate}, #{deptId}, NOW(), NOW()
,#{job} )
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.name dept_name FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE emp SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, image = #{image}, job = #{job}, salary = #{salary}, entry_date = #{entryDate}, dept_id = #{deptId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (CASE job WHEN 1 THEN '班主任' WHEN 2 THEN '讲师' WHEN 3 THEN '学工主管' WHEN 4 THEN '教研主管' WHEN 5 THEN '咨询师' ELSE '其他' END) AS pos, COUNT(*) AS total FROM emp GROUP BY job ORDER BY total
SELECT (CASE gender WHEN 1 THEN '男性员工' WHEN 2 THEN '女性员工' ELSE '其他' END) AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM emp GROUP BY gender
SELECT (CASE degree WHEN 1 THEN '本科' WHEN 2 THEN '大专' WHEN 3 THEN '高中' WHEN 4 THEN '初中' WHEN 5 THEN '小学' ELSE '其他' END) AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM student GROUP BY degree
SELECT c.name AS clazz, COUNT(*) AS total FROM student AS s INNER JOIN clazz AS c ON s.clazz_id = c.id GROUP BY clazz_id
